---
name: Frontend Quality
description: UI/UX quality bar for frontend files
applyTo: "**/*.{html,css,scss,sass,less,jsx,tsx,vue,svelte,astro}"
---
# Frontend Quality Standards

- Use `docs/frontend-standards.md` as the default design bar for frontend work.
- Treat spacing, typography, contrast, visual hierarchy, and alignment as part of correctness.
- Preserve or improve responsive behavior for mobile and desktop.
- Verify focus states, hover states, empty states, loading states, and error states when relevant.
- Prefer small, cohesive style systems over one-off magic numbers.
- Avoid generic, low-signal UI. Make layouts feel intentional.
